_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Design and implement NLP systems for defined business tasks, including model selection, data preparation, fine-tuning, evaluation, and deployment documentation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-008 (DA, cosine: 0.447), AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.469). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. NICE-only terms [activity, create, definition] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, data, defined, deployment, design, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.875, R=0.833). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.1%). "Create definition activity documentation" and "Design and implement NLP systems for defined business tasks, including model sel" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.451 ≈ STS 0.469 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [documentation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. NICE-only: [activity, create, definition]. WIDAI-only: [business, data, defined, deployment, design, evaluation].
